nasb.text: Then the king sent Jehudi to get the scroll, and he took it out of the chamber of Elishama the scribe. And Jehudi read it to the king as well as to all the officials who stood beside the king.

esv.text: Then the king sent Jehudi to get the scroll, and he took it from the chamber of Elishama the secretary. And Jehudi read it to the king and all the officials who stood beside the king.

cnv.text: 於是王差派猶底去把書卷拿來；猶底就從書記以利沙瑪的房間裡把書卷取來，向王和所有侍立在王左右的領袖宣讀。

ccb.text: 王就派犹底去把卷轴取来，犹底便从书记以利沙玛的房间取来卷轴，读给王和侍立在王周围的官长听。
